_readme: SAMPLE self-perception gauges — invented, illustrative only.
disclaimer: Incomplete by design — a language model's read of one person's chat titles. Not a test, no baseline, no clinical meaning.
readBy: a local model reading sample conversation titles

jungian.label: openness
jungian.reading: chases the unfamiliar; starts more than finishes

jungian.label: conscientiousness
jungian.reading: ships real things, but on impulse more than plan

jungian.label: introversion
jungian.reading: thinks on the page before speaking to anyone
jungian.limit: a journal skews inward by nature

jungian.label: intuition
jungian.reading: reasons by analogy and feel, then checks
jungian.limit: hard to separate from how they prompt

darkTriad.label: self-focus
darkTriad.reading: builds for themselves first, others second
darkTriad.limit: a private log is a self-focused artifact

darkTriad.label: strategy
darkTriad.limit: strategy rarely shows up in a scratchpad

darkTriad.label: detachment
darkTriad.limit: near the floor of what titles can show

metaperception.how_she_presents: a cheerful generalist who ships small delightful tools
metaperception.how_she_suspects_shes_seen: as scattered — too many half-built things
metaperception.how_the_data_reads_her: consistent obsessions (tools, sound, shipping) revisited under new names
metaperception.the_gap: what looks like scatter from outside is one question asked in eight materials

tensions.presents_data: cheerful surface vs real launch-eve dread
tensions.presents_suspects: confident maker vs fear of being scattered
tensions.suspects_data: feels scattered; the record shows a throughline

metaperception.limit: a mirror this small reflects the asker as much as the asked
